title: Add a mutex to BoltDB state to prevent lock issues
body:
Per https://www.sqlite.org/src/artifact/c230a7a24?ln=994-1081, POSIX file advisory locks are unsafe to use within a single process if multiple file descriptors are open for the same file. Unfortunately, this has a strong potential to happen for multithreaded usage of libpod, and could result in DB corruption.

To prevent this, wrap all access to BoltDB within a single libpod instance in a mutex to ensure concurrent access cannot occur.

comments.body: There is good news here - the file locks for containers and pods are managed by c/storage, which ensures that we only have one open file descriptor for each lock at any given time. So we should not need locking changes elsewhere.

:pushpin: Commit 42bd9d3 has been approved by `rhatdan`
